test-token.note: structural smoke token — proves 302 + ct= passthrough; keep

riff-tiktok-launch.note: TikTok bio (once >=1K followers) + pinned comments, launch window. PRE-LAUNCH dest = site /riff (coming-soon + email capture, no 404 during warmup). RE-POINT at launch (LD.6) to https://apps.apple.com/app/id6787581421?pt=127024128&ct=riff-tiktok-launch&mt=8

riff-ig-launch.note: Instagram bio, launch window. PRE-LAUNCH dest = site /riff. RE-POINT at launch (LD.6) to https://apps.apple.com/app/id6787581421?pt=127024128&ct=riff-ig-launch&mt=8

riff-yt-launch.note: YouTube channel link + pinned comments, launch window. PRE-LAUNCH dest = site /riff. RE-POINT at launch (LD.6) to https://apps.apple.com/app/id6787581421?pt=127024128&ct=riff-yt-launch&mt=8

riff-x-launch.note: X bio ONLY (never post bodies — attribution G-04). PRE-LAUNCH dest = site /riff. RE-POINT at launch (LD.6) to https://apps.apple.com/app/id6787581421?pt=127024128&ct=riff-x-launch&mt=8

riff-reddit-launch.note: Reddit profile + rare permitted post, launch window. PRE-LAUNCH dest = site /riff. RE-POINT at launch (LD.6) to https://apps.apple.com/app/id6787581421?pt=127024128&ct=riff-reddit-launch&mt=8

riff-site-hero.note: manifestlab.dev/riff store button — measures site-organic vs social. Dormant until launch (button renders at store.state=live). Store URL 404s until Riff is live; no re-point needed.

riff-web.note: Riff marketing page (/riff) primary CTA — hero + pricing 'Download' buttons. Measures the new page's App-Store conversion (2026-07-17 web-page build).

riff-web-footer.note: Riff marketing page footer App Store badge — isolates footer conversion from the hero CTA.
